# Christian José Torrealba Rondón - llms.txt
# Updated: May 2026

# Profile
Name: Christian José Torrealba Rondón
Title: Product Engineer | Systems Engineering Background | Web Development & Data Strategy
Specialization: Product Engineering • Full-Stack Development • Applied AI • Business Intelligence

# Professional Summary
Product Engineer with experience in bridging technical execution and business strategy. Combines strong full-stack development skills with product ownership and data-driven decision making. Currently focused on modern web technologies and Applied AI to build scalable, user-centric digital solutions.

# Core Expertise
- Product Engineering & End-to-End Ownership
- Full-Stack Development (Frontend & Backend)
- Technical Architecture & Modernization
- Business Intelligence, Data Analytics & ETL
- Agile Leadership & Team Mentorship
- API Design & System Integrations
- Applied AI & LLM workflows

# Key Technologies
Frontend: React, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, React Query, Tailwind, Vite, Webpack
Backend & APIs: Node.js, Python (in progress), GraphQL, RESTful APIs
Data & BI: SQL, Power BI, Tableau, BigQuery, Pentaho
Testing: Jest, Cypress, Playwright
Cloud & Observability: AWS, Sentry, Grafana
Tools: Figma, Jira, Notion, Confluence, Git

# Professional Experience Highlights
• Senior Product Software Engineer (Frontend focus) – Zeelo (Mobility) | 2024–2025
• Solutions Engineer – Full Stack Software Engineer – Stuart Delivery (Logistics) | 2020–2023
• Frontend Developer Architect – Zank Financial (Fintech) | 2019–2020
• Frontend Software Engineer (Data focus) – SDG Group | 2018–2019
• Product Software Engineer (Data Intelligence & R&D) – PDVSA (Energy) | 2011–2016

# Education
• Expert Diploma in Tech Management & Technical Leadership – Polytechnic University of Valencia
• Master in e-Business Management – University of Barcelona
• Postgraduate in Business Intelligence – Autonomous University of Barcelona
• Degree in Systems Engineering – UNEFA, Venezuela

# Certifications
• Professional Scrum Product Owner I (PSPO-I)
• Professional Scrum Master I (PSM-I)
• Professional Agile Leadership (PAL-I)
• Generative AI Overview for Product Managers – PMI
• Enterprise Design Thinking Practitioner – IBM
• System Thinking for Project Management – MIT

# Languages
Spanish (Native) • English (Professional) • French (Pre-Intermediate)

# Philosophy
V-shaped professional who connects strategy, technology execution, and data to deliver high-impact digital products. Strong believer in ownership, continuous learning, and building systems that truly solve business problems.
